message:
feat(mvcc): add epoch-based reclamation (EBR) module for safe concurrent version store cleanup

Add ebr.rs (108 lines) implementing epoch-based reclamation for the MVCC
version store. EBR allows concurrent readers to safely access version
chain entries while the garbage collector reclaims unreachable versions,
replacing the previous stop-the-world GC approach with a lock-free
protocol that tracks reader epochs to determine when retired versions
can be safely freed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
